channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: ossu /computer-science | HTML | N/A
item.description: 🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!

item.title: codecrafters-io /build-your-own-x | Markdown | N/A
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: Graphify-Labs /graphify | Python | N/A
item.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

item.title: github /copilot-sdk | Java | N/A
item.description: Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

item.title: mattpocock /skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: lobehub /lobehub | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 🤯 LobeHub is your Chief Agent Operator, organizing your agents into 7×24 operations by hiring, scheduling, and reporting on your entire AI team.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo /awesome-llm-apps | Python | N/A
item.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

item.title: hasaneyldrm /exercises-dataset | HTML | N/A
item.description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.

item.title: openinterpreter /openinterpreter | Rust | N/A
item.description: A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3

item.title: PostHog /posthog | Python | N/A
item.description: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.

item.title: Nutlope /hallmark | CSS | N/A
item.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

item.title: apache /ossie | Python | N/A
item.description: Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata across analytics, AI and BI platforms, providing a vendor neutral, single source of truth for semantic data
